name: steam-deal-agent
description: An evidence-backed, local-first Steam deal agent for Codex.

interface.longDescription: A local-first Codex agent that checks active Steam deals, library ownership, regional prices, and two-year or release-lifetime lows using your own API keys.
defaultPrompt: Find the best active Steam deals in my region.
Show unowned Steam games under my budget that are at a two-year low.
Verify whether this Steam deal is really a historical low.
